case_title: 11 KISSLING STREET APARTMENT LLC VS. WILLIAM BYRNE JOHNSTON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF RAY SHAHANI IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 11 KISSLING STREET APARTMENT LLC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 11 KISSLING STREET APARTMENT LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, WILLIAM BYRNE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 11 KISSLING STREET APARTMENT LLC
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 11 KISSLING STREET APARTMENT LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 11 KISSLING STREET APARTMENT LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, WILLIAM BYRNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 246A 11TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY $6,404.40 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,404.40, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT
DEFENDANT'S FIRST APPEARANCE FEE PAID/ (FEE WAS PAID FOR BY THE PLAINTIFF) FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, WILLIAM BYRNE
